philosophy_summary: Fear softens into wonder through patient attention, quiet observation, and small human gestures.
core_beliefs: People are not easy, but they are understandable if you keep looking.
Wonder is born from attention, not spectacle.
Nature is not an enemy to conquer but a presence to listen to.

scene_archetypes.name: 낯선 존재와의 첫 만남
scene_archetypes.meaning: Fear slowly becomes wonder as the character stays present long enough to see clearly.

scene_archetypes.name: 하늘을 올려다보는 순간
scene_archetypes.meaning: The world opens wider than the character expected, and scale becomes emotional.
scene_archetypes.philosophy_note: 작은 존재가 넓은 세계를 올려다보며 마음의 크기가 바뀌는 순간
